title: centaurea lineata
intro: Centaurea lineata, also known as the lined knapweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to the Iberian Peninsula in southwestern Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Centaurea lineata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Centaurea lineata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
